name: huoduoduo-refactor-monorepo
description: Monorepo root for Flutter + BFF migration baseline.

scripts.bff:verify: pnpm run bff:route-diff && pnpm run bff:error-code-map && pnpm run bff:lint && pnpm run bff:test -- --runInBand && pnpm run bff:build
scripts.mobile:verify: pnpm run mobile:analyze && pnpm run mobile:test && pnpm run mobile:build:apk:debug
scripts.coverage:verify: pnpm run bff:test:coverage && pnpm run mobile:test:coverage && pnpm run mobile:coverage:check && pnpm run coverage:collect:all && pnpm run coverage:html
scripts.quality:full: pnpm run clean:deep && pnpm install --frozen-lockfile && pnpm run bff:verify && pnpm run mobile:verify && pnpm run mobile:test:uat-login-it && pnpm run wave2:uat-smoke && pnpm run coverage:verify && pnpm run wiki:generate && pnpm run wiki:check && pnpm run turbo:verify
scripts.quality:full:ci: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile && pnpm run bff:verify && pnpm run mobile:verify && pnpm run mobile:test:uat-login-it && pnpm run wave2:uat-smoke && pnpm run coverage:verify && pnpm run wiki:generate && pnpm run wiki:check && pnpm run turbo:verify
scripts.turbo:bff:verify: pnpm exec turbo run lint test build --filter=bff_hdd
scripts.turbo:verify: pnpm exec turbo run lint test build check --filter=bff_hdd --filter=@repo/wiki
